diagrams.title: E-Waste Composition and Hazards
diagrams.description: Shows typical percentage composition of e-waste and associated hazards for each component
elements: Metals (40%) - copper, iron, aluminum, precious metals
Glass (15%) - CRT, displays with lead oxide
diagrams.purpose: Understanding what materials e-waste contains and their potential hazards

diagrams.title: Heavy Metals Impact on Human Body
diagrams.description: Body diagram showing which organs are affected by which heavy metals from e-waste
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the health impacts of heavy metal exposure from e-waste

diagrams.title: E-Waste Recycling Process Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow diagram of e-waste recycling process from collection to material recovery
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the systematic approach to e-waste recycling and material recovery
